design_philosophy: A modern, highly professional, Arabic-first (RTL) platform emphasizing clarity, authority, and frictionless user experience. The design uses a Swiss structural grid with generous whitespace, grounded by strict geometric typography (Cairo) and elevated by precise, minimal interactions. The primary color (#f47424) is used with extreme restraint—only for primary conversion actions—preventing visual fatigue and highlighting critical user flows.

global_rules.accessibility: WCAG AA compliant, high contrast for text, strictly managed focus states
global_rules.spacing: Generous (Tailwind p-6 to p-24 scale), utilizing internal padding heavily to prevent border collisions.
global_rules.corners: Slightly rounded (rounded-md to rounded-xl) to maintain professional sharpness while feeling approachable.

scales.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-tight

typography.alignment: Right-aligned (text-right) by default due to RTL. Center-aligned for hero and specific short-copy sections.

layout_and_spacing.rtl_considerations: Always use logical Tailwind properties: start/end instead of left/right (e.g., ms-4 instead of ml-4, pe-6 instead of pr-6, rounded-s-md, border-s-2).

navigation.style: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-gray-100
navigation.active_state: text-primary relative after:absolute after:bottom-[-4px] after:right-0 after:w-full after:h-0.5 after:bg-primary

buttons.primary: bg-[#f47424] text-white hover:bg-[#d9641d] px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-bold transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-bold transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-orange-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-semibold transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-gray-200 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:-translate-y-1 relative overflow-hidden
cards.interactive_indicator: absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-0 h-1 bg-primary transition-all duration-300 group-hover:w-full

inputs.default: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-md px-4 py-3 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all dir-rtl

calendar.usage: Use Shadcn Calendar component for meeting room bookings. Ensure day text is clearly visible. Active/Selected day MUST use primary color.

motion.page_load: Fade in with subtle slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0 over 0.6s) using Framer Motion.
motion.stagger: Lists and grid items should stagger in at 0.1s intervals.

hero.background: Full-screen video background (use workspace_lounge image as fallback poster).
hero.typography: text-white text-center. Headline: 'تجربة عمل مختلفة… تبدأ من هنا' (A different work experience... starts here).
hero.ctas: Two buttons: Primary 'احجز مساحتك الآن' (Book your space now), Secondary 'تواصل معنا' (Contact Us, styled as glass/white-border).

homepage.services_overview: Grid of cards highlighting Shared Desks, Private Offices, Meeting Rooms, Smart Pods. Clean icons (use Lucide-react or Phosphor).
homepage.target_audience: Section titled 'من هم عملاؤنا' (Who are our clients). Bento grid showcasing Freelancers, Startups, Corporate Teams.
homepage.why_kun: Section titled 'لماذا كُن' (Why KUN). Minimalist feature list (e.g., 24/7 access, High-speed internet, Premium locations).
homepage.image_gallery: Horizontal scrolling gallery of high-quality workspace imagery (Framer motion carousel).
homepage.final_cta: Bold section with light gray background, strong H2, and Primary CTA button.

spaces_page.layout: Grid layout showing different workspace types.
spaces_page.booking_flow: Integration of Shadcn Calendar for meeting room availability. Price tags prominently displayed.

pods_page.layout: Hero image highlighting the soundproof pod. Feature list outlining privacy, acoustics, ventilation. Simple booking CTA.

image_urls.description: Premium modern minimalist workspace lounge for hero section fallback.
Sleek, modern minimalist soundproof office pod.
Minimalist seating area with wood furniture.
Modern conference room with white table and black chairs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly wrap the main App or layout in a container with 'dir="rtl"' and set the HTML lang to 'ar'. All alignments should follow RTL logical rules natively (e.g., text-start, ms-4, pe-4).
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all iconography.
Do NOT use raw HTML forms; use Shadcn UI Form, Input, and Textarea components heavily customized to match the light theme.
Use Shadcn's Calendar component for the meeting room booking feature.
Restrict the use of the primary orange (#f47424) strictly to buttons, active tab indicators, and subtle hover borders. DO NOT use it as a large background or text color for body paragraphs.
Do NOT use heavy box-shadows. Use subtle borders (border-gray-100/200) and very soft, large-spread shadows only on hover (e.g., shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]).
All navigation links and action items must include standard 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link').
